questionHtml:
Which trends are correct across period 3 (from Na to Cl)?

I.   Atomic radius decreases
II.  Melting point increases
III. First ionization energy increases

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: Which trends are correct across period 3 (from Na to Cl)? I. Atomic radius decreasesII. Melting point increasesIII. First ionization energy increases A. I and II only B. I and III
